verdict_reason: 3.6 explicitly does NOT claim the Gita is a tech manual. The engineering body uses 'engineering reading' / 'engineering analog' / 'pale shadow' / 'operational silhouette' framings to register the analog as analog. Where the verse's metaphysical reach exceeds the engineering layer, the verse-record tags STRETCHED and explicitly says so in the body (the yajña-block verses 3.9-3.15). No conflation with 'the Gita is really about engineering' is committed.
